name: Burkhart Dental Supply
description: Burkhart Dental Supply emphasizes its commitment to providing dentists with high-quality dental equipment and personalized service. They recognize the importance of both modern online convenience and traditional face-to-face interactions, ensuring that dental professionals have access to the best tools and education for patient care.

name: Dental Health Products Inc. (DHP)
description: DHP provides a wide range of dental supplies and equipment, boasting over 80,000 products from more than 550 manufacturers. With a dedicated team and extensive experience, DHP aims to offer personalized solutions to dental professionals across the nation.

name: Best Dental Deals
description: The company, BDD, offers a wide range of dental equipment and products through its online platform BESTDENTALDEALS.IN, ensuring timely delivery and competitive pricing. They feature an extensive assortment of dental equipment from top brands, including portable X-ray machines, digital imaging sensors, and various dental chairs, making it a convenient resource for dental professionals.

name: Dentalair
description: Dentalair is a specialized provider in the dental market, offering a wide range of dental equipment, including treatment chairs, digital X-ray machines, and sterilization equipment. With over 57 years of expertise, the company emphasizes quality and innovation in its products and services.

name: SPS Dental
description: SPS Dental is dedicated to providing effective solutions for dental practices by offering a wide range of durable and affordable dental equipment from respected manufacturers. Their selection includes essential items such as dental chairs, cabinetry, suction pumps, and X-ray systems, ensuring that clinics have everything they need to operate smoothly.

name: Dentsply Sirona
description: Dentsply Sirona is a prominent manufacturer of dental equipment and technologies, offering a wide range of products designed for dental professionals. Their X-Smart® Pro+ endo-motor, which includes an integrated apex locator, exemplifies their commitment to enhancing precision and safety in dental procedures.

name: DMI
description: DMI is an independent dealer for leading dental equipment brands like Dentsply Sirona, A-dec, and KaVo, providing a comprehensive range of products and services to meet all surgery requirements. With a focus on customer satisfaction and a personal service approach, DMI ensures access to the latest dental supplies and equipment.

name: Dental Hygienics and Decontamination Ltd
description: The company offers comprehensive operator training and preventative maintenance for dental equipment, ensuring compliance with HTM01-05 standards. They also provide free technical advice and can match quotes, emphasizing their commitment to quality service and support for dental practitioners.

name: Dent Support A/S
description: The company specializes in dental equipment, offering a wide range of products such as treatment chairs, dental units, and X-ray technology, along with services like repair and clinic conversion. Their commitment to customer relationships and extensive service support ensures that dental practices receive both quality equipment and ongoing maintenance.

name: Dentalkart
description: Dentalkart is a prominent online retailer that specializes in a wide range of dental equipment, offering over 35,000 products from more than 125 brands. With a focus on quality and durability, Dentalkart provides comprehensive solutions for dental clinic setups, making it a trusted resource in the dental industry.
